name: deepwork
description: Framework for AI-powered multi-step workflows with quality gates

interface.longDescription: Run DeepWork workflows in Codex with bundled skills and MCP configuration, while keeping DeepWork's Codex hooks repo-local.
defaultPrompt: Use DeepWork to create a reusable workflow for competitive research.
Use DeepWork to continue the active workflow in this repository.
Use DeepWork to inspect the available workflows and help me pick one.
